_comment: JavaScript modules emphasize arrow functions and import wiring; the profile gives explicit weight to top-level and nested arrow functions alongside class and call structure. grammar_profile still keys Tree-sitter JavaScript/TS as grammar_name=typescript, so the samples below are JS-heavy npm repos: listed q is the aggregate (total_quality_score/total_files) for that row (same as seen in the analyze summary), while per-file scoring for .cjs/.mjs/.js uses this profile when applicable.
